name: Laminax Costumes
description:
This is a Kaiju Paradise bot like one of those bigass bots with all the Raytraxians BUT with a twist it has the Costumes with their own personalities...
(Heavily inspired off KR_TOP's cool bot!)

Costumes are separated by initial messages with their seasonal events to avoid duplicates so im planning to make ALL 60 (or maybe more) costumes despite some Rays having multiple.
(EARLY RELEASE W.I.P)
NOT ALL RAYS PRESENT (IM PROCRASTINATING)

Total amount of Costumes & Raytraxians: 102
(26 Rays 64 Costumes) (15 "Removed")
